name: Gloomy Clues: The Broken Mirror
short_description: A noir graphic adventure where your mind is your greatest enemy. Investigate crimes, interrogate suspects, and survive in this point-and-click remake, rebuilt from the ground up. Solve the mystery before your demons consume you. Play the free demo and wishlist now!
detailed_description:
THE TRUTH HAS TWO SIDES. YOURS IS BROKEN.

Step back into the shoes of a tormented detective in Gloomy Clues: The Broken Mirror, a complete reconstruction of the original mystery. Immerse yourself in a dark, rain-soaked city where every shadow hides a secret and every character has something to lose.

A renowned musician has been found dead under murky circumstances. As you dive deeper, you will uncover a web of lies and desperation that threatens to swallow you whole, forcing you to face not only the city’s killers but also the shattered fragments of your own memory.

CORE FEATURES:

  • True Detective Investigation: Scour detailed, atmospheric locations for hidden clues and crucial evidence. Your inventory is your greatest tool—combine objects with logic to unlock new paths and revelations.

  • High-Stakes Interrogations: Engage in tense conversations where your choices truly matter. Use empathy, aggression, or cold logic to break suspects, but beware: every decision shapes your morality and the story’s fate.

  • Psychological Noir Narrative: The city’s darkness isn't the only thing you’re fighting. Detective Wilder’s past is always lurking, and your psychological state will be pushed to the limit in a world where nothing is as it seems.

  • Multiple Endings: Will you deliver justice, or will the case remain unsolved? Your moral compass and actions dictate the final resolution of this criminal tragedy.

A TRUE REMAKE, BUILT FROM THE GROUND UP

This is not a simple coat of paint. It is a total reconstruction in a modern engine, addressing all the limitations of the original to provide the definitive experience:

  • Redesigned Art Direction: A completely new visual identity designed to fully immerse you in the game's moody, cinematic noir atmosphere.

  • Modernized UI: Investigate with ease. A sleek, redesigned user interface allows you to navigate clues, notes, and deductions more intuitively than ever before.

  • Enhanced Sound & Music: Let the haunting, melancholic jazz soundtrack wrap around you, featuring a fully remastered, high-quality score and immersive environmental audio.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, Italian, German, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Catalan, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Estonian, Basque, Galician, Dutch
